title: Flat rate subscription with entitlements
description: Learn how to create a flat rate subscription with entitlements to manage customer feature access.

nodes.title: Create a Basic product tier
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create a feature for the Basic tier
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Attach the feature to the product
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create a test clock
nodes.description: Run the test-clock setup and confirm the subscription billing flow can use the created clock.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the described test flow and confirm the expected result is observable.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Run the customer setup and confirm the customer is attached to the test clock.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the described test flow and confirm the expected result is observable.

nodes.title: Create a checkout session
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout process
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Track subscription creation
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger customer.subscription.created` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.

nodes.title: Check customer entitlements
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger entitlements.active_entitlement_summary.updated` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.

steps.title: Advance to the next billing cycle

nodes.title: Advance time to billing date
nodes.description: Run the clock advance and confirm it moves to the next billing cycle.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the described test flow and confirm the expected result is observable.

nodes.title: View the invoice created
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger invoice.created` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.

nodes.title: View the invoice created
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Wait for test clock to be ready.
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger test_helpers.test_clock.ready` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.

nodes.title: Delete the test clock
nodes.description: Run the cleanup and confirm the test clock is deleted after verification.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the described test flow and confirm the expected result is observable.
